subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled with the fire of guidance! Blessed are the souls who, like a radiant flame, become the cause of illumining human hearts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتعل بنار هدایت حبذا حال نفوسیکه چون شعله نورانی سبب روشناای قلوب انسانی
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @being a source of living waters in teaching the Cause
